---
title: "Day 20 - Social Post Drafts"
format: html
---

## LinkedIn

Day 20 of the #30DayChartChallenge: Global change.

For today's prompt we looked for a small operational signal rather than a dramatic system break: departure taxi-out time across the Brazil and Europe study airports.

The chart compares monthly median taxi-out time from 2023 to 2025, using daily airport-level taxi-out aggregates for 12 airports per region. The line shows the median airport-month; the shaded band shows the interquartile range of daily airport medians.

The takeaway is a quiet divergence. Europe drifts upward by about one minute, suggesting gradually increasing pressure on the departure flow, while Brazil remains broadly steady over the same period.

Joint work by DECEA Performance Section and EUROCONTROL PRU.

#30DayChartChallenge #Day20 #DataVisualization #Aviation #AirTrafficManagement #RStats #ggplot2

## Bluesky

Day 20 #30DayChartChallenge: Global change.

Taxi-out time tells a quiet operational story: Europe drifts upward from 2023 to 2025, while Brazil remains broadly steady.

Monthly median departure taxi-out time across 12 study airports per region; shaded bands show the IQR of daily airport medians.

Joint work by DECEA Performance Section and EUROCONTROL PRU.

#30DayChartChallenge #Day20 #DataViz #Aviation #RStats
